sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ اسْتِخْدَامَ مَوَاقِعِ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ يَوْمِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Mnogi ljudi vole svakodnevno koristiti društvene mreže.
sentences.translationEn: Many people like to use social media sites daily.

sentences.arabic: يَنْشُرُونَ صُوَرًا جَمِيلَةً لِحَيَاتِهِمْ وَيَتَحَدَّثُونَ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Oni objavljuju lijepe fotografije iz svog života i razgovaraju s prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: They post beautiful pictures of their lives and talk with their friends.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ الْمِنَصَّاتُ فِي تَقْرِيبِ الْمَسَافَاتِ بَيْنَ الْبَشَرِ.
sentences.translation: Ove platforme pomažu u smanjivanju udaljenosti među ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: These platforms help in bringing people closer together.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنْ يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا أَنْ نَسْتَخْدِمَهَا بِحَذَرٍ وَاعْتِدَالٍ.
sentences.translation: Ali moramo ih koristiti s oprezom i umjerenošću.
sentences.translationEn: But we must use them with caution and moderation.
